import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

def task_func(list_of_pairs):
    df = pd.DataFrame(list_of_pairs, columns=['Category', 'Value'])

    # Set the style of the plot
    plt.style.use('seaborn-whitegrid')

    # Create and configure the bar chart
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(10, 6))
    sns.barplot(x='Category', y='Value', data=df, ax=ax)

    # Set the title of the barplot
    ax.set_title('Category vs Value')

    # Ensure the plot is labeled and ticked properly
    ax.set_xticklabels(df['Category'].values, rotation=45)

    return df, ax
